Info.ToolboxConfigModel: {"entries":[{"content":{},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectStateValidationIssueList","uuid":"4a21ef47-ffcb-4d65-87ab-2af9df4a68ba"},{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_56394cbd-18aa-4c90-a827-9d586a2b45e4","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_56394cbd-18aa-4c90-a827-9d586a2b45e4"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"b6a53c2e-dc17-498b-a1c9-7185ac6316cd"},"authorName":"Austin Decker","description":"A zero-dependency HTTP server framework for MATLAB, inspired by Flask. Build REST APIs and serve local or team-facing web applications — entirely in MATLAB, no external toolboxes required beyond `tcpserver` (R2021a+) and `dictionary` (R2022b+).","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_56394cbd-18aa-4c90-a827-9d586a2b45e4","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_56394cbd-18aa-4c90-a827-9d586a2b45e4"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"2a558857-699f-46c2-8c9d-d2a46ba6cd56"},"matlabPathExclusionList":["toolbox/doc"],"maxRelease":"R2025b","minRelease":"R2022b","outputFileName":"matlab-http-server.mltbx","outputFolder":"release","summary":"An http server for MATLAB","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"toolbox","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_56394cbd-18aa-4c90-a827-9d586a2b45e4","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_56394cbd-18aa-4c90-a827-9d586a2b45e4"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"9987434e-cc75-41fd-a6eb-b800a110f327"},"toolboxName":"matlab-http-server","toolboxVersion":"1.0.0","uniqueId":"81f96282-e8f0-4da4-9dab-44d96e8e1a23"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"aaf04a4b-2827-4ac3-9564-2cb7a798f2cc"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
